TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Anteng, title = Anteng, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anteng} }

S.FORM: alang Anteng ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 208 buwan, 495 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 462 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 33 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 87%, Amis 2%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Anteng hya' ga Draki. tay 'llaw na Anteng hya' ga Kus kus. tay 'zil na Anteng hya' ga Kapanan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Anteng ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 208 buwan, 495 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 462 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 33 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 87%, Amis 2%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Anteng hya' ga Draki. tay 'llaw na Anteng hya' ga Kus kus. tay 'zil na Anteng hya' ga Kapanan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ anteŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βotan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na anteŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *raki. taj ʔllaw na anteŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kus~ɕ kus~ɕ. taj ʔzil na anteŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kapanan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
